languages.text: [draft]{n}Он снимает с пояса необычного вида клинок с мягко светящимся лезвием.{/n} "Я узнал тебя, {name} фон Валанциус. Твое имя звучало в летописях, как {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}имя достойн{mf|ого|ой}{/d}. Этот меч принадлежал одному из моих братьев, павших в бою, и его необходимо вернуть в {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караул.{/g} Теперь это — твой долг, поскольку мне вряд ли суждено покинуть это место".

traits.locale_text: "Благодарю тебя, слуга {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}. Я вижу свет Его, коснувшийся тебя, и отраженный в твоих деяниях. Неслучайно достойный встретился мне в этом проклятом месте". {n}Он вытаскивает из ножен необычного вида клинок с мягко светящимся лезвием.{/n} "Прими эту реликвию и стань ее хранителем. Если в своих странствиях встретишь кого-то из {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караула{/g}, вручи ему клинок и сообщи, что брат Виктус исполнил свой долг в жизни и в смерти".

languages.text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."
languages.original_text: [draft]{n}Он снимает с пояса необычного вида клинок с мягко светящимся лезвием.{/n} "Я узнал тебя, {name} фон Валанциус. Твое имя звучало в летописях, как {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}имя достойн{mf|ого|ой}{/d}. Этот меч принадлежал одному из моих братьев, павших в бою, и его необходимо вернуть в {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караул.{/g} Теперь это — твой долг, поскольку мне вряд ли суждено покинуть это место".

Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

[draft]{n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was one of worth. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

languages.text: {n}彼はベルトから、エッジが柔らかく光る変わった形の剣を抜いた。{/n}「君、ヴァランシウス家の{name}様。君の名は記録にあり、{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}名声のある者{/d}であった。この剣は戦場で倒れた兄の物だ。{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死の監視団{/g}に返還する必要がある。今は君の番だ。私はこの場所を離れることは難しいだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}彼はベルトから、エッジが柔らかく光る変わった形の剣を抜いた。{/n}「君、ヴァランシウス家の{name}様。君の名は記録にあり、{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}名声のある者{/d}であった。この剣は戦場で倒れた兄の物だ。{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死の監視団{/g}に返還する必要がある。今は君の番だ。私はこの場所を離れることは難しいだろう。」

languages.text: {n}他从腰间拔出一柄形制奇特、刀锋泛着微光的剑。{/n}“我认得你，{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，你的名字曾出现在编年史中，{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}声名显赫{/d}。这把剑原属于我一位战死的兄弟。它必须被送还给{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死亡守望{/g}。现在我把这份职责交给你，因为我几乎不可能离开这里了。”
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}他从腰间拔出一柄形制奇特、刀锋泛着微光的剑。{/n}“我认得你，{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，你的名字曾出现在编年史中，{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}声名显赫{/d}。这把剑原属于我一位战死的兄弟。它必须被送还给{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死亡守望{/g}。现在我把这份职责交给你，因为我几乎不可能离开这里了。”

languages.text: {n}Kemerinden hafifçe parlayan, bir ucu olan alışılmadık görünümlü bir bıçak çıkarıyor.{/n} "Seni tanıdım {name} von Valancius. Adın vakayinamelerde geçiyordu, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}değerli bir isimdi{/d} de. Bu kılıç, savaşta yiten kardeşlerimden birine aitti. {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Ölümnöbeti'ne{/g} geri verilmeli. Artık bu vazife senin zira buradan çıkma umudum çok az."
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kemerinden hafifçe parlayan, bir ucu olan alışılmadık görünümlü bir bıçak çıkarıyor.{/n} "Seni tanıdım {name} von Valancius. Adın vakayinamelerde geçiyordu, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}değerli bir isimdi{/d} de. Bu kılıç, savaşta yiten kardeşlerimden birine aitti. {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Ölümnöbeti'ne{/g} geri verilmeli. Artık bu vazife senin zira buradan çıkma umudum çok az."

languages.text: {n}Se quita del cinturón una espada de aspecto singular, que emite un leve brillo desde la hoja.{/n} «Te reconozco, {name} von Valancius. Tu nombre está en las crónicas, destacando como {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}figura digna{/d}. Esta espada fue de uno de mis hermanos, caído en combate. Debe volver a manos de los {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Vigías de la Muerte{/g}. Te corresponde el deber, ya que no tengo muchas esperanzas de salir de aquí».
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Se quita del cinturón una espada de aspecto singular, que emite un leve brillo desde la hoja.{/n} «Te reconozco, {name} von Valancius. Tu nombre está en las crónicas, destacando como {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}figura digna{/d}. Esta espada fue de uno de mis hermanos, caído en combate. Debe volver a manos de los {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Vigías de la Muerte{/g}. Te corresponde el deber, ya que no tengo muchas esperanzas de salir de aquí».

languages.text: {n}Il dégaine une lame intrigante dont le tranchant luit étrangement.{/n} « Je vous reconnais, {name} von Valancius. Votre nom figurait dans les chroniques et avait de la {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}valeur{/d}. Cette épée appartenait à l'un de mes frères tombés au combat. Elle doit revenir à la {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Je vous confie cette mission, car j'ai peu d'espoir de survivre à cet endroit. »
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il dégaine une lame intrigante dont le tranchant luit étrangement.{/n} « Je vous reconnais, {name} von Valancius. Votre nom figurait dans les chroniques et avait de la {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}valeur{/d}. Cette épée appartenait à l'un de mes frères tombés au combat. Elle doit revenir à la {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Je vous confie cette mission, car j'ai peu d'espoir de survivre à cet endroit. »

languages.text: {n}Er nimmt eine ungewöhnliche Klinge mit einer sanft schimmernden Schneide von seinem Gürtel.{/n} "Ich erkenne Euch, {name} von Valancius. Euer Name stand in den Chroniken, und es war ein {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Name von Wert{/d}. Dieses Schwert gehörte einem meiner Brüder, der in der Schlacht fiel. Es muss zur {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g} zurückgebracht werden. Das ist nun Eure Pflicht, denn ich habe nur wenig Hoffnung, diesen Ort zu verlassen."
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "I recognise you, {name} von Valancius. Your name was in the chronicles, and it was {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}one of worth{/d}. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."
